
---
author: ""
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
description-meta: "Blog — research summaries and commentary on proteomics, AI/ML, and drug discovery by Santosh D. Bhosale"
listing:
    contents: 
      - "Serum-Proteomics-Pre-diabetic/index.qmd"
      - "Serum-Proteomics-Atherosclerosis/index.qmd"
      - "Mass-Spectrometry-Based-Serum-Proteomics/index.qmd"
      - "AP-MS-to-Study-FOSL-Related-Proteins-Interactome/index.qmd"
      - "Serum-Proteomics-of-mother-infant-dyads-T1D-risk/index"
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
toc-title: Year
toc-location: right
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
image: ""
code-tools: false
comments: false
---

```{=html}
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  body { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; }

  .blog-intro {
    max-width: 680px;
    margin: 0 0 2.5rem;
  }
  .sec-label {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.13em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #8888aa;
    margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
    display: block;
  }
  .blog-intro h1 {
    font-family: 'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 2rem;
    color: #1a1a2e;
    margin: 0 0 0.8rem;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }
  .blog-intro p {
    font-size: 0.97rem;
    color: #4a4a6a;
    line-height: 1.75;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .wordcloud-wrap {
    margin: 0 0 3rem;
  }
  .wordcloud-wrap .wc-label {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.13em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #8888aa;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    display: block;
  }
  .wordcloud-wrap p {
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    color: #4a4a6a;
    margin: 0 0 0.9rem;
    line-height: 1.65;
  }
</style>

<div class="blog-intro">
  <span class="sec-label">Writing & Research</span>
  <h1>Blog</h1>
  <p>Summaries and commentary on some of my published research — spanning serum proteomics, biomarker discovery and protein interactions.</p>
</div>

<div class="wordcloud-wrap">
  <span class="wc-label">Research Topics</span>
  <p>The following WordCloud visualizes some of my research topics, extracted from my Google Scholar publications using the <a href="https://shiny.rcg.sfu.ca/u/rdmorin/scholar_googler3/" target="_blank">Scholar Googler</a> Shiny app.</p>
  <img src="/img/wordcloud.png" width="500" alt="Research wordcloud generated from Google Scholar publications" />
</div>
```
